name: Inline Static Mixer — Pressure Drop, Mixing Length & Coefficient of Variation
subtitle: Chemical Process Engineering | Mixing — Sulzer Chemtech Static Mixer Engineering Guide, Chemineer Design Manual
standardsBasis: Sulzer Chemtech Static Mixer Engineering Guide

inScope: Inline Static Mixer — Pressure Drop, Mixing Length & Coefficient of Variation
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

inputs.label: Required Coefficient of Variation at Mixer Exit (CoV_req)

standards.code: Sulzer Chemtech Static Mixer Engineering Guide
standards.name: Inline Static Mixer — Pressure Drop, Mixing Length & Coefficient of Variation
standards.description: Inline Static Mixer — Pressure Drop, Mixing Length & Coefficient of Variation — Chemical Process Engineering, Mixing

formulas.expression: Math.PI / 4 * Math.pow(pipe_ID_mm / 1000, 2); v_m_s = flow_rate_m3h / 3600 / A_pipe_m2; Re = fluid_density_kg_m3 * v_m_s * pipe_ID_mm / 1000 / (fluid_viscosity_mPas / 1000)
formulas.reference: Re = ρ·v·D/μ — flow regime governs mixing mechanism and ΔP correlation

formulas.expression: (Re < 2300) ? 16/Re : 0.0791 * Math.pow(Re, -0.25); L_mixer_m = num_elements * pipe_ID_mm / 1000 * 1.5; dP_pipe_pa = 4 * f_fanning * (L_mixer_m / (pipe_ID_mm/1000)) * fluid_density_kg_m3 * Math.pow(v_m_s, 2) / 2

formulas.reference: ΔP_mixer = K_p × ΔP_empty_pipe over mixer length — Sulzer / Chemineer product data

formulas.expression: 1.0; CoV_actual = (Re > 10000) ? CoV_0 * Math.pow(0.316, num_elements) : CoV_0 * Math.pow(0.5, num_elements * 0.7)
formulas.reference: Turbulent: CoV reduces by factor ~0.316 per element (Kenics HEV)
N_req = log(CoV_req / CoV_0) / log(decay_factor) — Kenics design method

formulas.expression: num_elements * pipe_ID_mm / 1000 * 1.5; epsilon_w_kg = dP_mixer_pa * v_m_s / fluid_density_kg_m3

warnings.source: Sulzer Chemtech Static Mixer Engineering Guide
warnings.message: Laminar flow with Kenics HEV: designed for turbulent use — switch to Sulzer SMX (K_p=37) optimised for viscous laminar mixing

warnings.source: Sulzer Chemtech Static Mixer Engineering Guide
warnings.message: Element count below minimum for target CoV — mixing quality not achieved; add N_req − N_e elements or accept higher CoV

warnings.source: Sulzer Chemtech Static Mixer Engineering Guide
warnings.message: High velocity in dense fluid: erosion risk on mixer elements — verify element material hardness; consider ceramic-coated elements for slurries

warnings.source: Sulzer Chemtech Static Mixer Engineering Guide
warnings.message: Low specific energy dissipation (<0.1 W/kg): mixing is gentle — suitable for shear-sensitive products (emulsions, cells); otherwise increase velocity

warnings.source: Sulzer Chemtech Static Mixer Engineering Guide
warnings.message: High viscosity fluid (>10 Pa·s): static mixer will have very high ΔP — evaluate dynamic (agitated) mixer or reduce viscosity by heating before mixing

verdictText.warn: PASS — High Utilization: Peer Review Required
